items.h: Brian Cage Says He Got The Call To Make AEW Return The Night Before It Happened
items.p: Brian Cage details his return to AEW. ‘The Machine’ made his surprise return to the company on the May 13 episode of AEW Dynamite, where he answered Kevin Knight’s TNT Championship open challenge....

items.h: Former Producer Road Dogg Says WWE Doesn't View AEW As Competition But It Should
items.p: WWE Hall of Famer Road Dogg has admitted that the company didn't view AEW competition, but that mindset needs to change.

items.h: Sareee Offers Neck Injury Update, May Be Replaced In AEW Dynamite Tournament Match
items.p: Sareee is scheduled to face Skye Blue in the Owen Hart Foundation Cup tournament on "AEW Dynamite" and has been dealing with a neck injury.

items.h: Takumi Iroha to serve as back-up if Sareee is not cleared for AEW Summer Blockbuster
items.p: Sareee has a contingency plan in case her neck is not healed in time for this week’s AEW Summer Blockbuster show. The post Takumi Iroha to serve as back-up if Sareee is not cleared for AEW Summer...

items.h: Matt Hardy Identifies Wrestler Whom He Believes Is 'Carrying' AEW
items.p: Matt Hardy believes that the absence of a top star due to injury would affect AEW, stating that he is the one carrying the promotion.

items.p: A backstage report on the extended absence of AEW star Keith Lee reveals there had been discussions about bring Lee back to television months ago

items.h: Matt & Nick Jackson Of The Young Bucks Offer Update On AEW Star Adam Cole
items.p: Adam Cole was last seen in AEW when he tearfully relinquished the TNT Championship at ALL IN Texas last July due to a concussion.
